text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: At last, we have reached the final chapter. Onward to Origins of the Centurial Overlord Act III!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Before this camp ends, I'll have broken through
my oppressive competition and claimed
indubitable victory. I will be born again—a brand
new Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I await Poseidon, god of the sea... and the
power he shall grant unto me!
